heading: Mode or time of collection
label: 6302 Mode or time of collection
notes: Editorial Notes

L. 113–295, § 221(a)(110)(C)“(A) .—In determining whether the requirements of subparagraph (B) of paragraph (2) are met, taxes required to be paid by electronic fund transfer under sections 5061(e) and 5703(b) shall be disregarded.Coordination with certain excise taxes“(B) .—Under regulations, any tax required to be paid by electronic fund transfer under section 5061(e) or 5703(b) shall be paid in such a manner as to ensure that the requirements of the second sentence of paragraph (1)(A) of this subsection are satisfied.”Additional requirement2010—Subsec. (d). amended subsec. (d) generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “The taxes imposed by subsections (a) and (b) of section 4161 (relating to taxes on sporting goods) shall be due and payable on the date for filing the return for such taxes.”Pub. L. 104–188, § 1704(t)(52)section 11801(c)(22)(A) of Pub. L. 101–508Subsec. (g). , inserted “, 22,” after “chapters 21”.Pub. L. 104–188, § 1702(c)(3)1994—Subsec. (e). , reenacted heading without change and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “If, under regulations prescribed by the Secretary, a person is required to make deposits of any tax imposed by section 4251 or subsection (a) or (b) of section 4261 with respect to amounts considered collected by such person during any semimonthly period, such deposit shall be made not later than the 3rd day (not including Saturdays, Sundays, or legal holidays) after the close of the 1st week of the 2nd semimonthly period following the period to which such amounts relate.”Pub. L. 103–465, § 712(d)Subsec. (f). , substituted “certain excise taxes” for “taxes on gasoline and diesel fuel” in heading and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows:Pub. L. 103–465, § 712(a)“(1) .—Notwithstanding section 518 of the Highway Revenue Act of 1982, any person whose liability for tax under section 4081 is payable with respect to semimonthly periods shall, not later than September 27, make deposits of such tax for the period beginning on September 16 and ending on September 22.General rule“(2) .—If, but for this paragraph, the due date under paragraph (1) would fall on a Saturday, Sunday, or holiday in the District of Columbia, such due date shall be deemed to be the immediately preceding day which is not a Saturday, Sunday, or such a holiday.”Special rule where due date falls on saturday, sunday, or holiday1993—Subsec. (f). inserted “and diesel fuel” after “gasoline” in heading.Pub. L. 103–66Subsecs. (h), (i). added subsec. (h) and redesignated former subsec. (h) as (i).Pub. L. 103–1821990—Subsec. children.heading: Establishment by regulations
children.label: a Establishment by regulations
children.text: If the mode or time for collecting any tax is not provided for by this title, the Secretary may establish the same by regulations.

children.heading: Discretionary method
children.label: b Discretionary method
children.text: Whether or not the method of collecting any tax imposed by chapter 21, 31, 32, or 33, or by section 4481 is specifically provided for by this title, any such tax may, under regulations prescribed by the Secretary, be collected by means of returns, stamps, coupons, tickets, books, or such other reasonable devices or methods as may be necessary or helpful in securing a complete and proper collection of the tax.

children.heading: Use of Government depositaries
children.label: c Use of Government depositaries
children.text: The Secretary may authorize Federal Reserve banks, and incorporated banks, trust companies, domestic building and loan associations, or credit unions which are depositaries or financial agents of the United States, to receive any tax imposed under the internal revenue laws, in such manner, at such times, and under such conditions as he may prescribe; and he shall prescribe the manner, times, and conditions under which the receipt of such tax by such banks, trust companies, domestic building and loan associations, and credit unions is to be treated as payment of such tax to the Secretary.

children.heading: Time for payment of manufacturers’ excise tax on recreational equipment
children.label: d Time for payment of manufacturers’ excise tax on recreational equipment
children.text: The taxes imposed by subchapter D of chapter 32 of this title (relating to taxes on recreational equipment) shall be due and payable on the date for filing the return for such taxes.

children.heading: Time for deposit of taxes on communications services and airline tickets
children.label: e Time for deposit of taxes on communications services and airline tickets

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), if, under regulations prescribed by the Secretary, a person is required to make deposits of any tax imposed by section 4251 or subsection (a) or (b) of section 4261 with respect to amounts considered collected by such person during any semimonthly period, such deposit shall be made not later than the 3rd day (not including Saturdays, Sundays, or legal holidays) after the close of the 1st week of the 2nd semimonthly period following the period to which such amounts relate.

children.heading: Special rule for tax due in September
children.label: 2 Special rule for tax due in September

children.heading: Amounts considered collected
children.label: A Amounts considered collected
children.text: In the case of a person required to make deposits of the tax imposed by section 4251, 4261, or 4271 with respect to amounts considered collected by such person during any semimonthly period, the amount of such tax included in bills rendered or tickets sold during the period beginning on September 1 and ending on September 11 shall be deposited not later than September 29.

children.heading: Special rule where September 29 is on Saturday or Sunday
children.label: B Special rule where September 29 is on Saturday or Sunday
i
children.text: in the case of Saturday, the preceding day, and

children.label: ii
children.text: in the case of Sunday, the following day.

children.heading: Taxpayers not required to use electronic funds transfer
children.label: C Taxpayers not required to use electronic funds transfer
children.text: In the case of deposits not required to be made by electronic funds transfer, subparagraphs (A) and (B) shall be applied by substituting “September 10” for “September 11” and “September 28” for “September 29”.

children.heading: Time for deposit of certain excise taxes
children.label: f Time for deposit of certain excise taxes

children.heading: General rule
children.label: 1 General rule
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this subsection and subsection (e), if any person is required under regulations to make deposits of taxes under subtitle D with respect to semimonthly periods, such person shall make deposits of such taxes for the period beginning on September 16 and ending on September 26 not later than September 29.

children.label: A
children.text: the second semimonthly period in August, and

children.label: B
children.text: the period beginning on September 1 and ending on September 11,

children.heading: Taxpayers not required to use electronic funds transfer
children.label: 3 Taxpayers not required to use electronic funds transfer
children.text: In the case of deposits not required to be made by electronic funds transfer, paragraphs (1) and (2) shall be applied by substituting “September 25” for “September 26”, “September 10” for “September 11”, and “September 28” for “September 29”.

children.heading: Special rule where due date on Saturday or Sunday
children.label: 4 Special rule where due date on Saturday or Sunday
A
children.text: in the case of Saturday, the preceding day, and

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of Sunday, the following day.

children.heading: Deposits of social security taxes and withheld income taxes
children.label: g Deposits of social security taxes and withheld income taxes
children.text: If, under regulations prescribed by the Secretary, a person is required to make deposits of taxes imposed by chapters 21, 22, and 24 on the basis of eighth-month periods, such person shall make deposits of such taxes on the 1st banking day after any day on which such person has $100,000 or more of such taxes for deposit.

children.heading: Use of electronic fund transfer system for collection of certain taxes
children.label: h Use of electronic fund transfer system for collection of certain taxes

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The Secretary shall prescribe such regulations as may be necessary for the development and implementation of an electronic fund transfer system which is required to be used for the collection of depository taxes. Such system shall be designed in such manner as may be necessary to ensure that such taxes are credited to the general account of the Treasury on the date on which such taxes would otherwise have been required to be deposited under the Federal tax deposit system.

children.heading: Exemptions
children.label: B Exemptions
children.text: The regulations prescribed under subparagraph (A) may contain such exemptions as the Secretary may deem appropriate.

children.heading: Depository tax
children.label: A Depository tax
children.text: The term “depository tax” means any tax if the Secretary is authorized to require deposits of such tax.

children.heading: Electronic fund transfer
children.label: B Electronic fund transfer
children.text: The term “electronic fund transfer” means any transfer of funds, other than a transaction originated by check, draft, or similar paper instrument, which is initiated through an electronic terminal, telephonic instrument, or computer or magnetic tape so as to order, instruct, or authorize a financial institution or other financial intermediary to debit or credit an account.

children.heading: Coordination with other electronic fund transfer requirements
children.label: 3 Coordination with other electronic fund transfer requirements
children.text: Under regulations, any tax required to be paid by electronic fund transfer under section 5061(e) or 5703(b) shall be paid in such a manner as to ensure that the requirements of the second sentence of paragraph (1)(A) of this subsection are satisfied.
